name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or missing capability.

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see built.

## Which panel / component does it affect?
- [ ] Mission Control Dashboard
- [ ] Agent Manager
- [ ] News Panel
- [ ] Price Panel
- [ ] Wallet Panel
- [ ] Agent Room (2D)
- [ ] Agent Terminal
- [ ] Gateway / API
- [ ] Trading strategy
- [ ] macOS app / installer
- [ ] Other

## Additional context
Any mockups, examples, or references.
